message:
chore(beads): sync issue ledger with resize scheduler and runtime_compat beads

Update the local-first issue tracker ledger to reflect the latest bead
activity from the resize investigation (wa-1u90p) and concurrent swarm
work, adding ~30 lines of issue metadata for new and progressed beads
across the resize scheduler, runtime_compat migration, and vendored
crate test expansion tracks.
